flashcards.back: A collection of related Python modules organized in a directory hierarchy, identified by __init__.py files. Enables code organization and distribution.
Marks directory as Python package. Can contain initialization code or define package-level variables.
pip install paho-mqtt (Used for MQTT communication in IoT)

flashcards.front: Two key benefits of virtual environments
flashcards.back: 1. Isolate project dependencies 2. Prevent version conflicts between packages

flashcards.front: Structure of a minimal Python package
flashcards.back:
Directory with:
1. __init__.py
2. Module files (.py)
3. setup.py (for distribution)
Control Raspberry Pi's GPIO pins for IoT hardware interfacing
Module: Single .py file. Package: Directory containing modules + __init__.py
Run 'pip freeze > requirements.txt' in activated virtual environment
Read temperature/humidity data from DHT sensors in Python IoT projects
1. paho-mqtt 2. RPi.GPIO 3. requests (Any other valid examples accepted)
Contains package metadata (name, version, dependencies) for distribution via pip
pip install -r requirements.txt
Efficient numerical processing of sensor data arrays
source env_name/bin/activate
cryptography (Provides encryption/decryption functions)

flashcards.back: Flask or Django (Microframeworks for building web services)

Enables code reuse across multiple IoT projects
pandas (Efficient handling of sensor data streams)
